---
title: "Prepare Data for Analyses - Novel GlP1s vs other classes"
author: "Gwen Aubrac"
format: html
embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Convert appropriate variables to factors, create variable for index year, create missing categories for region, race/ethnicity, and plan type.
Save list of relevant covariates in a vector that will be used in next codes for the weighting models.

**Sensitivity-controlled options** (set by `SCENARIO` - see `sensitivity.R`):
- `require_metformin`: restrict to patients with prior metformin and drop it from covariates
- `max_baseline_age`: drop patients with `age > max_baseline_age`

```{r}
#| label: clean-and-prep
## clean and format covariate data for weighting models

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(haven)
library(lubridate)

project_root <- Sys.getenv("PROJECT_ROOT")
if (nchar(project_root) == 0) stop("PROJECT_ROOT is not set. To run this file directly in an R session, source code/00-setup.R first in the same session (it loads .Renviron). Otherwise launch the full pipeline via run_all.R / run_all.command / run_all.bat.")
output_dir      <- Sys.getenv("OUTPUT_DIR",      unset = file.path(project_root, "output"))
main_output_dir <- Sys.getenv("MAIN_OUTPUT_DIR", unset = output_dir)
results_dir <- Sys.getenv("RESULTS_DIR", unset = file.path(project_root, "results", "main"))
# Reads of upstream files fall back to main's output when running a
# sensitivity scenario (OUTPUT_DIR is per-scenario; MAIN_OUTPUT_DIR is main).
out_path <- function(name) {
  p <- normalizePath(file.path(output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  normalizePath(file.path(main_output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

# Load sensitivity scenario (defaults to `main` if SCENARIO_NAME is unset)
source(file.path(project_root, "sensitivity.R"))
SCENARIO <- get_scenario()

data <- read_dta(out_path("covs_novel.dta"))

summary(data$bmi)

# should be empty
test <- data %>% filter(is.na(bmi))

# These patients had a Z68 code in lookback but its BMI category was unreadable:
# step 06 reads the category from characters 4-5 of the code (substr(CODE,4,2)
# then destring), so a non-standard or truncated Z68 code whose 4th-5th
# characters aren't both digits yields a missing BMI. Exclude them.
data %<>% filter(!is.na(bmi))
n_after_bmi <- nrow(data)

table(data$index_class)
table(data$index_glp1)

# combine hypertension into single binary indicator
data %>%
  summarize(
    hyper1 = sum(hyper1),
    hyper2 = sum(hyper2),
    hyper3 = sum(hyper3),
    hyper4 = sum(hyper4),
    hyper5 = sum(hyper5),
    hyper6 = sum(hyper6),
    hyper7 = sum(hyper7)
  )

data %<>%
  mutate(
    hyper = if_else(hyper1==1 | hyper2==1 | hyper3==1 | hyper4==1 | hyper5==1 | hyper6==1 | hyper7==1, 1, 0)
  )

table(data$hyper)

# combine dyslipidemia into single binary indicator
data %>%
  summarize(
    dyslipid1 = sum(dyslipid1),
    dyslipid2 = sum(dyslipid2),
    dyslipid3 = sum(dyslipid3),
    dyslipid4 = sum(dyslipid4),
    dyslipid5 = sum(dyslipid5)
  )

data %<>%
  mutate(
    dyslipid = if_else(dyslipid1==1 | dyslipid2==1 | dyslipid3==1 | dyslipid4==1 | dyslipid5==1, 1, 0)
  )

table(data$dyslipid)

# drop columns we don't need anymore
data %<>%
  select(-days_to_index, -hyper1, -hyper2, -hyper3, -hyper4, -hyper5, -hyper6, -hyper7, -dyslipid1, -dyslipid2, -dyslipid3, -dyslipid4, -dyslipid5)

#### COMORBIDITIES ####

# list of comorbidities indicators create based on date of occurrence
# this list will be saved and re-used for the analyses, so only need to update covs here
cov_clinic <- c(
  "alcohol", 
  "cancer", 
  "cvd", 
  "ckd", 
  "revas", 
  "ampu", 
  "retino", 
  "diab_neuro",
  "hypoglyc",
  "dyslipid",
  "eskd",
  "hepa",
  "hyper",
  "ihd",
  "nafld",
  "pace",
  "pvd",
  "vhd",
  "edema",
  "copd",
  "apnea",
  "thyroid",
  "depression",
  "anxiety",
  "falls", 
  "fractures",
  "care_dependency",
  "malnutrition",
  "aki",
  "proteinuria",
  "hf_hosp",
  "hosp_cat",
  "emerg_cat",
  "statin", 
  "betablocker", 
  "arb",
  "thiazide",
  "ccb",
  "aceinhibitor",
  "insulin",
  "metformin",
  "diuretic",
  #"thiazolidinediones" none found for now
  "prop_b_q"
          )

summary(data)

# convert the variables to factors
for (var in cov_clinic) {
  print(var)
  data[[var]] <- as.factor(if_else(is.na(data[[var]]), 0, data[[var]]))
}

# prop_b_q is an ACS quintile (1-5); the if_else above mapped patients with
# missing ZIP-level data to 0, which should display as "Missing" in tables
# and downstream. Relabel the factor level only; positional encoding for
# modelling is preserved.
if ("0" %in% levels(data$prop_b_q)) {
  levels(data$prop_b_q)[levels(data$prop_b_q) == "0"] <- "Missing"
}

summary(data)


#### OTHER COVARIATES ####

data$year <- as.factor(year(data$index_date))

# categorize BMI and create missing category
# create 1-point increment categories
data$bmi_cat <- cut(data$bmi, 
                    breaks = c(0, 18.5, 25, 30, 35, 40, Inf),
                    labels = c("<18.5", "18.5-24.9", "25-29.9", "30-34.9", "35-39.9", "40+"),
                    right = FALSE)

data$bmi_cat <- as.character(data$bmi_cat)
data$bmi_cat[is.na(data$bmi)] <- "Missing"
table(data$bmi_cat)

data %<>% 
  mutate(
    region = if_else(region == '', 'MISSING', region),
    race = if_else(race == '', 'MISSING', race),
    plan_type = if_else(plan_type == '', 'MISSING', plan_type)
    )

# we will remove patients with missing region because there are few
# and this causes issues with the IPCW and IPCW models later
table(data$region)

data %<>%
  filter(region != "MISSING")
n_after_region <- nrow(data)

cov_demog <- c(
  "gender",
  "year",
  "bmi_cat",
  "region",
  "race",
  "plan_type"
)

for (var in cov_demog) {
  print(var)
  data[[var]] <- as.factor(data[[var]])
}


# set reference group to largest group
table(data$race)
data$race <- relevel(data$race, ref = "WHITE")

table(data$plan_type)
data$plan_type <- relevel(data$plan_type, ref = "MEDICARE")

table(data$region)
data$region <- relevel(data$region, ref = "MIDWEST")

# this is the final list of covariates
cov_list <- c("age", cov_clinic, cov_demog)
cov_list

# Sensitivity: require prior metformin use at baseline (and drop it from covariates,
# since every retained patient now has metformin == 1).
if (isTRUE(SCENARIO$require_metformin)) {
  data %<>% filter(metformin == 1)
  cov_list <- cov_list[!cov_list %in% "metformin"]
}

# Sensitivity: cap baseline age (Inf disables the filter).
if (is.finite(SCENARIO$max_baseline_age)) {
  data %<>% filter(age <= SCENARIO$max_baseline_age)
}

saveRDS(cov_list, file.path(output_dir, "cov_list_novel.rds"))
saveRDS(data, file.path(output_dir, "clean_novel.rds"))

# Append rows to the eligibility flowchart CSV written by step 07
# to add missing BMI and missing region exclusions
# and if those rows were previously written, we overwrite them
flowchart_path <- file.path(results_dir, "eligibility_steps_by_cohort.csv")
if (file.exists(flowchart_path)) {
  flow <- readr::read_csv(flowchart_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

  r_side_steps <- c(
    "After exclude unreadable BMI/Z68 value", "After exclude missing region",
    "Subgroup novel semaglutide", "Subgroup novel tirzepatide",
    "Subgroup novel SGLT2", "Subgroup novel DPP4",
    "Subgroup novel sulfonylureas"
  )
  flow <- flow[!flow$step %in% r_side_steps, , drop = FALSE]

  seq_steps <- c("After exclude unreadable BMI/Z68 value", "After exclude missing region")
  seq_counts <- c(n_after_bmi, n_after_region)
  running <- tail(flow$novel, 1)
  excluded_seq <- integer(length(seq_counts))
  for (i in seq_along(seq_counts)) {
    excluded_seq[i] <- running - seq_counts[i]
    running <- seq_counts[i]
  }

  subgroup_steps <- c(
    "Subgroup novel semaglutide", "Subgroup novel tirzepatide",
    "Subgroup novel SGLT2",       "Subgroup novel DPP4",
    "Subgroup novel sulfonylureas"
  )
  subgroup_counts <- c(
    sum(data$index_glp1  == "semaglutide", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(data$index_glp1  == "tirzepatide", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(data$index_class == "SGLT2",       na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(data$index_class == "DPP4",        na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(data$index_class == "SULFO",       na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  new_rows <- tibble(
    step = c(seq_steps, subgroup_steps),
    novel = as.integer(c(seq_counts, subgroup_counts)),
    `Excluded (novel)` = c(excluded_seq, rep(NA_integer_, length(subgroup_steps)))
  )

  flow <- dplyr::bind_rows(flow, new_rows)
  readr::write_csv(flow, flowchart_path)
} else {
  warning("eligibility_steps_by_cohort.csv not found at ", flowchart_path)
}
```
